title: Gesneria cinnabarina
taxonomy: Gesneria cinnabarina is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. The Gesneriaceae family is part of the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The order Lamiales is further classified under the clade Asterids, which is one of the two main groups of flowering plants. The clade Asterids is a subgroup of the larger clade Angiosperm, which contains all flowering plants.
uses: Gesneria cinnabarina is a plant with limited information available.
